summary: Testing complete for DOMMMA V2 new features: Nova AI search bar on homepage, 4-column property grid, 'Made with Emergent' badge hidden, password hashing with bcrypt. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: API health check - /api/ returns DOMMMA V2 message
Backend: New user registration with hashed password (bcrypt)
Backend: Login with correct password succeeds
Backend: Login with wrong password returns 401 Unauthorized
Backend: Duplicate email registration returns 400
Backend: Login auto-creates new user if not exists
Backend: Legacy plaintext password migration support
Backend: secure-test@dommma.com / SecurePass123! credentials work
Backend: Renter role login and verification
Backend: Landlord role login and verification
Backend: Contractor role login and verification
Frontend: Homepage Nova AI search bar visible with Bot icon
Frontend: Nova search input placeholder text correct
Frontend: Nova search suggestions dropdown shows 4 prompts on focus
Frontend: Nova search navigates to /browse?nova=query
Frontend: Property grid displays 4 columns (xl:grid-cols-4)
Frontend: Property grid responsive (3 cols lg, 2 cols sm, 1 col mobile)
Frontend: 12 featured property cards displayed
Frontend: 'Made with Emergent' badge hidden via CSS
Frontend: Renter dashboard loads with sidebar navigation
Frontend: Landlord dashboard loads with Properties/Applications/Jobs menus
Frontend: Contractor dashboard loads with Jobs/Schedule/Payments menus
seed_data_creation: Created test users during password authentication tests (prefixed with uuid)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All V2 latest updates verified: 1) Nova AI search bar on homepage with suggestions dropdown and navigation to browse page, 2) Property grid changed from 1 to 4 columns (responsive design), 3) 'Made with Emergent' badge hidden via CSS, 4) Password hashing with bcrypt implemented for auth security with legacy plaintext migration support.

Nova AI Search Bar.details: Search bar visible on homepage, suggestions dropdown with 4 prompts on focus, navigates to /browse?nova=query

4-Column Property Grid.details: Grid classes: grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4, 12 property cards displayed

Made with Emergent Badge.details: CSS rules in index.css hide emergent-related elements, no visible badge found on page

Password Hashing (bcrypt).details: passlib/bcrypt used for hashing, verify_password supports both hashed and legacy plaintext, 401 on wrong password

Role-Based Dashboards.details: Renter sees Applications/Maintenance, Landlord sees Properties/Applications/Jobs, Contractor sees Jobs/Schedule
